sourceList.title: Mabelia van Voorne van Arkel Death Date	26 Feb 1313	Gorinchem, Gorinchem Municipality, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands Cemetery	Grote Toren "Find A Grave Index"
Mabelia van Voorne ist geboren am 26. Februar 1273 in Oostvoorne, Nederland.

zh.Amstelland, North Holland, Netherlands: 荷蘭努-拉藍德阿姆斯特倫藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel於1273年2月26日出生在荷蘭霍蘭奧斯特賀內時，她的父親Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland37歲，母親Aleida van Loon33歲。她於1293年與Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1313年2月26日在荷蘭-拉藍德格利姆享年40歲，埋葬在荷蘭-拉藍德格利姆。

zh-hans.Amstelland, North Holland, Netherlands: 荷兰努-拉藍德阿姆斯特倫藍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel于1273年2月26日出生在荷兰霍蘭奧斯特賀內时，她的父亲Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland37岁，母亲Aleida van Loon33岁。她于1293年与Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1313年2月26日在荷兰-拉藍德格利姆享年40岁，埋葬在荷兰-拉藍德格利姆。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Mabilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Carmino, Domenico, Luciano, Nicola.
Italian: altered form of Mabilia, from the old female personal name Mabile, from Latin Amabilis.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Wael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Fanciful spelling of Gail , also occasionally written Gaelle .

variants.name: Gail
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel was born on 26 February 1273, in Oostvoorne, Holland, Netherlands, her father, Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland, was 37 and her mother, Aleida van Loon, was 33. She married Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III in 1293. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 26 February 1313, in Gorinchem, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 40, and was buried in Gorinchem, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel est née le 26 février 1273, à Oostvoorne, Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Aleida van Loon, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III en 1293. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 février 1313, à Gorinchem, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Gorinchem, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel am 26. Februar 1273 in Oostvoorne, Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland 37 und ihre Mutter Aleida van Loon 33. Sie hat 1293 Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Februar 1313 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Gorinchem, Südholland, Niederlande und wurde in Gorinchem, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel è nata il il 26 febbraio 1273 nel Oostvoorne, Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Aleida van Loon, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III nel 1293. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 febbraio 1313, nel Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkelが1273年2月26日にオランダホーランドオオストボオルンで生まれた時，父Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeelandは37歳，母Aleida van Loonは33歳であった。1293年にJan Herbanen Van Arkel IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1313年2月26日にオランダズイド-hオランドゴリンケムで40歳で死去し，オランダズイド-hオランドゴリンケムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel(이)가 1273년 2월 26일 네덜란드 홀랜드 스트보른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aleida van Loon(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1293년 Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 2월 26일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 고린체에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 고린체에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel nasceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1273, em Oostvoorne, Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Aleida van Loon, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III em 1293. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1313, em Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel родилась 26 февраля 1273 г. в местности уствурн, холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Aleida van Loon, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III в 1293 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 февраля 1313 г. в местности горинчем, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности горинчем, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.26 February 1273–26 February 1313: 26 de febrero de 1273–26 de febrero de 1313
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel nació el 26 de febrero de 1273, en Oostvoorne, Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Aleida van Loon, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III en 1293. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1313, en Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
